title: Odisha Boiling In Heatwave, But Is Balasore Municipality Looting Shade Funds? - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
Odisha is literally boiling, but is someone making money off your suffering?
As the mercury soars across the state, standing at a traffic post for even a minute feels like your skin is burning. To provide some relief, the Balasore Municipality installed protective "Heat Sheds" at major traffic junctions. However, what was meant to be a service to the public has now turned into a massive controversy!
In this exclusive report, Kanak News uncovers the serious allegations of corruption surrounding these sheds. While the sun continues to beat down on Balasore residents, the quality and cost of these shade structures have come under intense scrutiny. Is this a case of siphoning off public funds in the name of heatwave protection? Watch the full ground report to see the reality behind Balasore's "Protection Sheds" and the public's outrage.
